profile.title: Let's set up your profile
profile.subtitle: Tell us a bit about yourself
profile.genderInfoMessage: We ask for gender information to help match you with appropriate playing partners and competitions.
profile.whyGender: Why we ask for gender information
profile.appleSignInHelper: Provided by Apple Sign-In (you can edit if needed)

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Decide how you want to be contacted. This will be visible only to people on your league or people you accept to play with.
contact.phoneHint: Optional - helps players contact you for matches
contact.subtitleWhatsApp: Decide how you want to be contacted via WhatsApp. This will be visible only to people on your league or people you accept to play with.
contact.chatBubble1: Hey! I saw you're free to play today evening?
contact.chatBubble2: I am! Let's do 5:30 at City park?
contact.saveError: Failed to save phone number. Please try again.

location.title: Where do you play?
location.subtitle: Select your city to find players and matches near you
location.notAvailable: Tenista is not yet available in this country
location.expandingSoon: We're expanding soon! Select another country or contact us to request your city.
location.noCourts: No courts available in this city yet
location.addingCourts: We're adding more courts soon! Contact us to suggest courts for this city.
location.selectCityMessage: Please select a city to continue.
location.saveError: Failed to save location. Please try again.

flag.title: Choose your flag
flag.subtitle: Choose your flag, which we'll use in the rankings and match results.
flag.saveError: Failed to save country. Please try again.

rating.title: Rating Selection
rating.subtitle: We use the NTRP (National Tennis Rating Program) system. Choose your rating to match with players at a similar skill level.
rating.beginnerDescription: New to tennis or learning the basics
rating.saveError: Failed to save rating. Please try again.

availability.title: Availability
availability.subtitle: Choose the days and times you want to play. You can change this anytime if your availability changes.
availability.helperText: Select your availability to receive match requests tailored to your schedule.
availability.saveError: Failed to save availability. Please try again.

homecourt.title: Select your home court or club
homecourt.subtitle: Where do you usually play?
homecourt.noCourt: I don't have a regular court
